headline: What Makes Host Hotels (HST) Appear so Attractive
summary: Host Hotels & Resorts Inc. (NASDAQ:HST) is one of the 10 cheap REITs with huge upside. As of the March 13 closing, consensus sentiment for Host Hotels & Resorts Inc. (NASDAQ:HST) remained moderately bullish. The stock received coverage from 12 analysts, 6 of whom assigned Buy ratings and 6 gave Hold calls. With no Sell […]
